Name: Belt Scavengers
Description: The asteroid belts of Star's End have a haunting reputation for murderous scav crews who hit isolated vessels and strip them to down empty wrecks, leaving no trace of the crew.
ReputationStatements: I argued against hiring outsiders. Don’t make me regret losing that argument.
You mercs always think you’re smarter than the room. Just follow the salvage plan.
You're the muscle, just hit the target and keep your mouth shut. Everyone walks away richer.
Ask too many questions and I pay too little, understand? You run the security, we run the salvage.
Working in the Belt is dangerous, just ask the captains around here. So many mechs and their crew go missing...
Our scav crews trust you, and you've got guts. I think we can make a lot of money together.
Mech-killer, welcome home! What are we scrapping today? You know, me and the boys have had our eyes on this job for a while...
MissionSuccessStatements: You fought like vacuum-born killers out there. Our scavs are impressed.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Cargo didn’t all make it home, but neither did the enemy get everything they wanted. Could've gone way worse.
BadFaithFailureStatements: You left us hanging out there. That's not something us scavs forget.
